title: [W]Claimant's pay
label: [W]Claimant's pay
p1: [W]For some types of claims, the tribunal will need the average of the claimant's last 12 weeks' pay. Provide your best estimate for the average weekly pay. You can correct it later if needed. Providing the pay information will help the tribunal process the claim.
p2: [W]You can get information from payslips. Include any overtime payments, commission and bonuses.
payBeforeTax: Rhowch y tâl CYN didyniadau treth ac Yswiriant Gwladol
payAfterTax: Rhowch y tâl AR ÔL didyniadau treth ac Yswiriant Gwladol
weeklyMonthlyAnnual: Ai dyma'r cyflog wythnosol, misol neu flynyddol?

payBeforeTax.required: [W]Tell us at least one amount for the claimant's pay
payBeforeTax.invalidCurrency: [W]Enter pay before tax and NI in the correct format, for example £600 or £193.54
payBeforeTax.tooHighCurrency: [W]Pay before tax and NI must be £9,999,999.99 or less

payAfterTax.required: [W]Tell us at least one amount for the claimant's pay
payAfterTax.invalidCurrency: [W]Enter pay after tax and NI in the correct format, for example £600 or £193.54
payAfterTax.tooHighCurrency: [W]Pay after tax and NI must be £9,999,999.99 or less

payInterval.payBeforeTax: [W]Tell us a frequency for the claimant's pay before tax and NI
payInterval.payAfterTax: [W]Tell us a frequency for the claimant's pay after tax and NI
